DPOS.name: DEGENERACY POLICE ORDER STATE
DPOS.actors: DPOS-TRON, Emperor Tomas The Greatest, General Guilliman, smnirevenge/OFFICER SMNI, tomasthegreatest2/Emperor T, heloo_guys123/Tung Sahur, sanguinius_of_baal/General Guilliman
DPOS.actions: Arrest the bad actors and expose their actions. Bring justice to the unjust
DPOS.indicators: Their targets have locked their accounts. They are publically launching operations and attacks. Suspected of several counts of murder and suicides. Potentially has caused self harm to targets.
DPOS.mitigation: Public exposure video currently being processed for development. Collected Incriminating Evidence. Monitored for a extended period of time. Terminated one of their discord servers. Currently data diving and profiling targets.
